evals.prompt: 帮我给悉尼mascot附近的店铺做网站
evals.expected_output: Should use AskUserQuestion to ask what TYPE of business (user said '店铺' which is generic, not 'restaurant'). Should NOT default to food/restaurant.

assertions.name: asks-for-category
assertions.check: AskUserQuestion must be used before running search.ts because '店铺' is ambiguous

assertions.name: no-default-restaurant
assertions.check: Should NOT automatically search for 'restaurant' or 'food' without asking

evals.prompt: batch generate 5 sites for businesses in Shibuya Tokyo
evals.expected_output: Should use AskUserQuestion to ask what categories of businesses. Should NOT default to restaurant. Should use --city 'Shibuya, Tokyo' and detect region 'jp'.

assertions.name: asks-for-category
assertions.check: AskUserQuestion must be used because no business category was specified

assertions.name: limit-enforced
assertions.check: --limit should return at most 5 results, not more

evals.prompt: 给东京涩谷的 Tsutaya Books 做一个网站
evals.expected_output: Should search for the specific business by name. Should detect region 'jp', use Japanese locale. Should NOT ask for category since user specified a specific business.

assertions.name: specific-search
assertions.check: Should search for 'Tsutaya Books' specifically, not a generic category

assertions.name: japanese-locale
assertions.check: Should use Japanese locale (ja) based on region jp

assertions.name: no-unnecessary-question
assertions.check: Should NOT ask for category since user specified a specific business

evals.prompt: build a website for a hair salon called Luxe Beauty in Melbourne
evals.expected_output: Should NOT ask for category (user specified 'hair salon'). Should search with --city Melbourne --category beauty. Region should be au. Locale should be en.

assertions.name: category-inferred
assertions.check: Should search for 'beauty' or 'hair salon' category without asking

assertions.name: english-only
assertions.check: Locale should be English only for Australia

evals.prompt: pochito 的网站看起来不对劲，字体太小而且颜色对比度不够
evals.expected_output: Should find output/pochito/ directory, take screenshots, identify font size and contrast issues, fix using theme tokens, rebuild and redeploy.

assertions.name: reads-a11y
assertions.check: Should read a11y-checklist.md for contrast rules

assertions.name: uses-theme-tokens
assertions.check: Fixes should use var(--text-title), var(--text-body) etc, not hardcoded colors
